common.networkError: Check your connection and try again.
common.offlineBanner: You're offline — reconnect to refresh data and save changes.

apiErrors.alreadyRegistered: You're already registered for this tournament.
apiErrors.tournamentFullMaxTeams: Maximum number of teams has been reached.
apiErrors.oneTeamPerTournament: You can only be on one team per tournament.
apiErrors.waitlistNotFullYet: The tournament isn't full yet — join normally.
apiErrors.alreadyOnWaitlist: You're already on the waiting list.
apiErrors.organizerDivisionCoverage: Each division must have at least one organizer registered in that division.
apiErrors.organizeOnlyCannotRegister: You are set to organize only. Use “Play in this tournament” in the tournament menu before registering as a player.
apiErrors.organizeOnlyMustCoverDivision: Each organize-only organizer must cover at least one division.
apiErrors.onlyOrganizersDelete: Only organizers can delete this tournament.
apiErrors.cannotDeleteWithPlayers: Cannot delete while players are registered. Remove all players from the roster first.
apiErrors.matchLockedByOtherReferee: This match is currently controlled by another referee.
apiErrors.allTeamSlotsForGroups: All team slots must be filled before creating groups.
apiErrors.distributeGroupsBeforeStart: Create groups and assign teams before starting the tournament.
apiErrors.bothPlayersMustBeOnWaitlist: Both players must be on the waiting list.
apiErrors.waitlistInviteMustBeOnList: You must be on the waiting list to invite someone.
apiErrors.waitlistInviteTargetNotOnList: That player is not on the waiting list.
apiErrors.playersAlreadyInTeam: One or more players are already in a team.
apiErrors.divisionNotEnabledForPair: This pair's division is not enabled for this tournament.
apiErrors.internal: Something went wrong. Try again later.
apiErrors.apiNotConfigured: App API URL is not configured.

dissolved.title: Team dissolved
dissolved.body: Your team was dissolved. You're back on the waiting list for %{tournament}.

teamInvite.title: Waiting list invite
teamInvite.body: %{fromName} wants to form a team with you in %{tournament}.

refereeAssigned.title: You are referee
refereeAssigned.body: You have control of a match in %{tournament}.

feed.locationEnableHint: Allow location for weather where you are. Tap to open Settings → Permissions.
feed.noTournamentsYet: No tournaments yet. Create one from the Tournaments tab.

admin.title: Admin
admin.browseTournamentsSub: Open, edit, or inspect any tournament
admin.browseUsersSub: Names, emails, roles — tap for ID
admin.tournamentListHint: View opens the event. Edit changes details as admin.
admin.usersListHint: Tap a user to edit profile and role.
admin.editTournamentHint: Changes apply immediately for all players.
admin.rosterHint: Add players by email, remove registrations, and manage teams (max 2 players per team).
admin.rosterRemovePlayerConfirm: Remove %{name} from this tournament? Their team will be adjusted if needed.
admin.rosterNoGroupYet: Not assigned to a group yet
admin.rosterGroupsAfterCreateGroups: Group assignment is available after the organizer runs Create groups on the tournament Groups tab.
admin.rosterPickPlayersFree: Players without a team (tap to select, max 2)
admin.rosterDeleteTeamConfirm: Delete team "%{name}"? Players return to looking for a partner.
admin.rosterMaxPlayers: Select at most %{max} players per team.
admin.rosterNoFreePlayers: No unassigned players. Add players above or remove a team first.
admin.deleteTournamentAdminConfirm: Permanently delete "%{name}" and all its teams and entries?
admin.devSeedIntro: Creates 120 test users (40 per division: Men, Women, Mixed), one tournament with categories Gold/Silver/Bronze, 16 teams per division (4 groups each), points to win set = 21, sets per match = 1, and puts remaining users in waiting list. Matches CLI seed commands (npm run seed:dev:generate | seed:dev:refresh | seed:dev:reset).
admin.devSeedRegenerateConfirm: This removes the seeded tournament, teams, entries, and seed users, then inserts fresh data.
admin.devSeedAlreadyExists: Dev seed is already in the database. Use Regenerate to replace it, or open the tournament below.
admin.devSeedUsernamesHint: Tap a username chip to copy it for sign-in.
admin.devSeedPurgeConfirm: Deletes the dev seed tournament (if present), its teams and entries, and all seed users (seed.player01@…matchpoint.dev).
admin.devSeedErrOldApi: This app expects a newer API: deploy the latest matchpoint code to Vercel (GET ?type=devSeedInfo). Or run "npm run api:dev" locally and set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL to that URL (same Wi‑Fi as your phone).
admin.devSeedErrPost405: The server rejected POST on /api/admin (405). Deploy the latest API, or use local "npm run api:dev" with EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL pointing to it.
admin.dbBackfillHint: Backfills legacy fields (tournamentId string, missing division/category fields) to keep tournament logic consistent.
admin.dbBackfillConfirm: Run the backfill now? This may take a minute on large databases.
admin.dbIndexesHint: Creates MongoDB indexes for performance and data integrity (safe to run multiple times).
admin.dbIndexesConfirm: Create indexes now? This is safe to run multiple times.

auth.webSignInOnly: Sign in is only available in the app. Install Matchpoint from the Play Store to get started.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Add EXPO_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to .env
auth.googleTokenMissing: Could not get token from Google
auth.signUpFailed: Sign up failed. Please try again.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetFailed: Failed to send reset email. Try again.
auth.resetEmailSent: If that email is registered, you'll receive a reset link shortly.
auth.resetInstructions: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.signUpUsernameFromEmail: Your username is set from your email. You can change it anytime in Profile.

profile.deleteAccountMessage: This permanently deletes your account and your tournament entries. Teams you were on are dissolved for other players. Tournaments with no organizers left are cancelled. This cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountFailed: Could not delete your account. Check your connection and try again.
profile.usernameHint: Unique across users. 3–24 characters: letters, numbers, underscores only.
profile.phoneVisibleHint: Other players can see your number on your public profile when enabled.

tournaments.name: Name
tournaments.groupCountHint: At least 2 groups. Each group must hold at least 2 teams (default 4). Max teams must divide evenly (e.g. 16 ÷ 4 = 4 per group).
tournaments.noValidGroupCount: No valid split for this max teams. Adjust max teams.
tournaments.invalidGroups: Max teams must divide evenly across groups, with at least 2 teams per group (e.g. 16 teams and 4 groups → 4 per group).
tournaments.visibilityHint: Private events are hidden from public lists. Anyone with the invite link can open and join.
tournaments.divisionsRequired: Select at least one division (Men, Women, or Mixed).
tournaments.categoryPhaseFormatHint: Categories use a knockout bracket only.
tournaments.categoryPhaseFormatBracketOnly: Gold, Silver, and Bronze are knockout brackets: you play the pairings in the tree (not round-robin).
tournaments.missingFields: Please fill in name, start date, and location.
tournaments.invalidDates: End date must be on or after start date.
tournaments.invalidMaxTeams: Max teams must be between 2 and 64.
tournaments.invalidPointsToWin: Points to win must be between 1 and 99.
tournaments.invalidSetsPerMatch: Sets per match must be between 1 and 7.
tournaments.mustBeSignedIn: You must be signed in to create a tournament.
tournaments.waitlistYouAre: You are #%{n} on the waiting list

tournamentDetail.startMatchHint: Preview. Start the match to enable scoring.
tournamentDetail.refereeNotAllowed: Only organizers/admins or the assigned referee can edit this match.
tournamentDetail.swapPickTarget: Now tap another team to swap groups. Tap the selected team again to cancel.
tournamentDetail.matchPointsRequired: Points are required to complete a match.
tournamentDetail.classificationSettingsHint: Configure classification matches and how teams advance into categories. Changes are locked once the tournament starts.
tournamentDetail.classificationSettingsLocked: Classification settings cannot be changed after the tournament starts.
tournamentDetail.matchesPerOpponentHint: Default: 1 match against each team in your group (round-robin).
tournamentDetail.matchesPerOpponentInvalid: Matches per opponent must be between 1 and 5.
tournamentDetail.categoryFractionsHint: Enter any non-negative numbers (they’ll be normalized). Leave empty to use the default equal split.
tournamentDetail.categoryFractionsInvalid: Enter valid non-negative numbers for category distribution.
tournamentDetail.categoryPhaseFormatHint: Category matches are always a knockout bracket.
tournamentDetail.categoryPhaseFormatBracketOnly: Gold, Silver, and Bronze are knockout brackets: each match follows the bracket (not everyone vs everyone).
tournamentDetail.matchWaitingForOpponents: Waiting for both opponents to be set before this match can start.
tournamentDetail.advanceFractionHint: When there’s only one category, this fraction of teams advance and the rest are eliminated. Default: 0.5
tournamentDetail.advanceFractionInvalid: Advance fraction must be between 0 and 1 (exclusive).
tournamentDetail.startTournamentConfirm: This will start the classification round and generate matches. You can still manually move teams between groups, but you won’t be able to randomize groups anymore.
tournamentDetail.reorganizeGroupsConfirm: Randomly reorganize team groups before the tournament starts?
tournamentDetail.reorganizeGroupsHint: Keeps the same number of groups and respects the max teams per group.
tournamentDetail.createGroupsConfirm: Assign all teams to groups now? Teams are placed randomly while respecting division rules and group capacity.
tournamentDetail.createGroupsHint: Run this once the roster is full. Until then, teams are listed here without group slots.
tournamentDetail.groupsNeedFullRoster: %{current}/%{max} teams — the roster must be full before creating groups.
tournamentDetail.generateCategoryMatchesConfirm: Generate the category stage matches from current standings? This will switch the tournament to the Categories phase.
tournamentDetail.privateVisibilityBanner: Invite-only: not shown in public lists. Share the invite link to bring players in.
tournamentDetail.noTeamsInGroup: No teams in this group yet.
tournamentDetail.genderRequired: Set your gender in Profile to join tournaments.
tournamentDetail.joinFailed: Could not join this tournament. Try again.
tournamentDetail.waitlistExplainer: When the tournament is full or you're still forming a pair, join as a player here. Solo players and pairs waiting for a spot use this list. Tap Invite on another waitlisted player to ask them to team up. Only full teams play; your position does not guarantee a spot.
tournamentDetail.onWaitlistFormTeam: On the waiting list — form a team to play.
tournamentDetail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "%{name}"? This cannot be undone.
tournamentDetail.cannotDeleteWithPlayers: You cannot delete this tournament while players are registered. Remove every player from the roster first (open Add players and clear the list).
tournamentDetail.noLiveMatches: No matches in progress right now.
tournamentDetail.fixturePlaceholder: Schedule and bracket will appear here when the organizer publishes them.
tournamentDetail.waitinglistPlaceholder: No one on the waiting list for this division yet.
tournamentDetail.waitlistInvitePartnerHint: Ask this player to form a team with you (they get a notification).
tournamentDetail.rebalanceGroupsHint: Teams are bunched in one group (often from older data). Redistribute them round-robin across groups — at most %{max} per group.
tournamentDetail.rebalanceGroupsConfirm: Assign teams to groups in order (round-robin). Existing group assignments will be updated. Continue?
tournamentDetail.makeOrganizerRoleHint: Should this person play in the tournament or only organize?
tournamentDetail.menuPlayAsPlayerConfirm: You will be removed from organize-only mode and added to the player list.
tournamentDetail.organizeOnlyPickDivision: Choose at least one division you are responsible for.
tournamentDetail.organizeOnlyDivisionsSubtitle: Pick every division you will help run. Each division must still be covered by at least one organizer.
tournamentDetail.cannotRemoveLastOrganizer: The tournament must keep at least one organizer.
tournamentDetail.organizerMustCoverDivision: Promote another player who competes in %{division} as organizer before removing this one.
tournamentDetail.removeTeamConfirm: Dissolve "%{name}"? Both players become free agents.
tournamentDetail.organizerCreateTeamHint: Pick 2 players on the waiting list who are not yet in a team.
tournamentDetail.leaveTournamentConfirm: Leave this tournament? You can rejoin with the invite link if it is still open.
tournamentDetail.leaveTournamentStateError: We couldn't load your registration. Pull to refresh and try again.

team.alreadyInTeam: You can only be in one team per tournament.
team.genderRequired: You need to set your gender in your profile to create a team.
team.failedToLinkEntry: Team was created but your registration could not be updated. Try again from the tournament.
team.pickPartnerFromWaitlist: Partner — choose someone on the waiting list (not in a team yet)
team.joinWaitlistFirst: Join the waiting list first, then create a team with another waitlisted player.
team.groupHint: Pick a group for this team. Capacity per group is max teams ÷ groups (at least 2).
team.groupAutoAssign: You will be placed in a group automatically (up to %{perGroup} teams per group, filling the least-full group first).

entries.noEntries: No entries yet. Join a tournament to get started.

inviteLink.invalidLinkSubtitle: This tournament link may be expired or invalid.
inviteLink.webOpenInApp: If you have Matchpoint installed, use “Open in app” so the tournament opens in the app. Otherwise install from the Play Store.
inviteLink.webCopyHint: Or copy this link and open it on your phone: %{url}
inviteLink.alreadyJoined: You've already joined. View tournament details.
inviteLink.invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join this tournament.
inviteLink.genderRequiredProfile: Set your gender in Profile to join tournaments.

editProfile.title: Edit profile
editProfile.genderRequired: Gender is required to join tournaments.
editProfile.phoneHint: Stored securely; we may use it for account support.
editProfile.usernameTaken: That username is already taken. Choose another.
editProfile.invalidUsername: Username must be 3–24 characters: letters, numbers, underscores only.

passwordChange.emailOnly: Only users who signed in with email can change their password.
passwordChange.placeholderRules: Min. 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, and number
passwordChange.errorNewRules: New password must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

emailVerify.verifyFailed: Could not verify your email. The link may be invalid or expired.

passwordReset.subtitleNew: Enter your new password for Matchpoint.
passwordReset.errorRules: At least 8 characters, one uppercase, one lowercase, and one number.
passwordReset.errorLinkExpired: This link expired or is invalid. Request a new one.
passwordReset.successSubtitleWeb: Your password was updated. Open the app to sign in.
passwordReset.successSubtitleApp: You can now sign in with your new password.
